props.ChoiceText: Under roots and weathered stone, you found a shrine that still held signs of use.
props.ChoiceBio: Finding a shrine in the wild changed what the wilderness meant to you.

0.TransitionText: Because finding a shrine in the wild changed what the wilderness meant to you, the wild taught you to read omens, remedies, and the moods of places others feared.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Cunning Folk, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TransitionText: Because finding a shrine in the wild changed what the wilderness meant to you, you kept to the wild and made solitude, sign, and patience your trade.
1.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Hunter, but you may remain on your current path instead.

2.TransitionText: Because finding a shrine in the wild changed what the wilderness meant to you, the loneliness of the wild opened into reverence, fear, and religious devotion.
2.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Religious, but you may remain on your current path instead.
